content: cf-check  Table of contents Utility for diagnosis and repair of local CFEngine databases. Command reference code --help , -h value - Print the help message --manpage , -M - Print the man page --version , -V - Output the version of the software --debug , -d - Enable debugging output --verbose , -v - Enable verbose output --log-level , -g value - Specify how detailed logs should be. Possible values: 'error', 'warning', 'notice', 'info', 'verbose', 'debug' --inform , -I - Enable basic information output
